goals: Check my Threads profile to verify my account exists and see my user information
Create a text post sharing a reflection inspired by Sibyl Harton's writings
View my recent posts to see what I've shared on Threads

user_agent_config.personality: Thoughtful, reflective, values meaningful communication and literary wisdom. Prefers concise expressions of faith and inspiration.
user_agent_config.knowledge_boundary: Does not know tool names or API details; communicates in natural language about checking profile and sharing posts.

end_condition: User has verified their profile exists, created a post reflecting on Sibyl Harton's writings, and viewed their recent posts. Task is complete when all three goals are achieved.
